navigation.notesSummary: Browse, search, and manage note cards

starting.title: Getting your notes ready
starting.description: NoteStack is starting its local data service.

takingLonger.title: Startup is taking longer than usual
takingLonger.description: NoteStack is still trying to start. You can keep waiting, retry, inspect the backend log, or exit.

failed.title: NoteStack could not start
failed.bridgeHelp: Restart NoteStack. If the problem continues, reinstall or contact support.

reasons.bridge-unavailable: NoteStack could not initialize its secure startup connection.
reasons.entrypoint-missing: The local data service could not be found.
reasons.spawn-error: The local data service could not be launched.
reasons.process-exited: The local data service stopped before it was ready.
reasons.termination-failed: The previous local data service could not be stopped safely.

failed.help: Try starting again. If the problem continues, open the backend log for more details.
